records.ety: [L. commentarius, commentarium, note book, commentary: cf. F. commentaire. See Comment, v. i.]

defs: A series of comments or annotations; esp., a book of explanations or expositions on the whole or a part of the Scriptures or of some other work.
quotes: This letter . . . was published by him with a severe commentary.

defs: A brief account of transactions or events written hastily, as if for a memorandum; -- usually in the plural; as, Caesar's Commentaries on the Gallic War.
A single essay, written or spoken, discussing or explaining a topic, especially regarding a recent event; as, the election report was followed by several commentaries from political analysts.
Something considered as exemplifying or illustrating a point or opinion; as, the California recall vote is a sad commentary on the frivolous approach of people to politics.
